title: Yondu
content:
{{CharHub|Yondu|Yondu}} {{Character |image = Yondu Infobox.png |real name = Yondu Udonta{{Ref|GotG}} |alias = {{Alias |nicknames = {{WPS|Mary Poppins}}{{Ref|GotGV2}}}} |species = [[Centaurian]] ([[Glossary#Cybernetically enhanced|Cyborg]]) |gender = Male |DOD = [[2014|October 2014]]{{Ref|GotGV2}} |title = Captain |affiliation = {{Affiliation|RVG}} (formerly)
*{{Affiliation|SOT}} (formerly)
*{{Affiliation|YRC}} (formerly)
{{Affiliation|GOTG}} |movie = ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]''
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]''
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]'' (illusion) |tv series = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[She-Hulk: Attorney at Law]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |tv movie = ''[[The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special]]'' (flashbacks) |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[The Ravagers]]'' |comic = ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Prequel Infinite Comic]]''
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 Prelude]]'' |book = ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Read-Along Storybook and CD]]''
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2: Meet the Team!]]''
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2: Rocket's Rules]]''
''[[Avengers: Infinity War: The Heroes' Journey]]'' (flashbacks) |actor = [[Michael Rooker]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|Yondu didn't have a {{WPS|KITT|talking car}} but he did have a [[Yaka Arrow|flying arrow]]. He didn't have the beautiful voice of an angel but he did have the whistle of one. Both Yondu and [[David Hasselhoff]] went on kick-ass adventures and hooked up with hot women and fought robots. I guess David Hasselhoff did kind of end up being my dad after all, and it was you, Yondu. I had a pretty cool dad.|[[Peter Quill]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} '''Yondu Udonta''' was the [[Centaurian]] leader of an exiled [[Yondu Ravager Clan|faction]] of the [[Ravagers]] and the adoptive father of [[Peter Quill]]. When Quill betrayed the Ravagers and stole the [[Orb]] for himself, Yondu led the hunt for his former ally. Eventually, Yondu caught up with Quill, but he was convinced to help him in the battle against [[Ronan the Accuser]], who was threatening to use the [[Power Stone]] to destroy [[Xandar]], with Quill ensuring Yondu did not get the [[Infinity Stones|Infinity Stone]] at the end. Despite losing the stone, Yondu chose not to get revenge against Quill, leading to mistrust among all of his own clan. Yondu's clan turned against their former captain and put their trust instead in [[Taserface]]. With the help of [[Rocket]], Yondu got his revenge against the mutineers and destroyed his own ship. Yondu went to help the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] in the battle against [[Ego]]. As the planet collapsed into itself, Yondu sacrificed his own spacesuit, and his own life in the process, saving Quill. ==Biography== {{MD|Yondu Udonta (Earth-199999)}} ===Early Life=== ====Becoming a Ravager==== {{Quote|I was a [[Kree]] battle slave for twenty years when [[Stakar Ogord|Stakar]] freed me. He offered me a place with the [[Ravagers]]. He said all I needed to do was adhere to the code. But I was young, and greedy, and stupid.|Yondu Udonta to [[Rocket]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Yondu Udonta's early years were not easy for him: his parents sold him to the [[Kree Empire]] and he spent most of his youth closed in a cage. After twenty years of slavery, [[Stakar Ogord]] freed Yondu and welcomed him into the [[Ravagers]]. Yondu eventually became the leader of his own [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravager clan]]. When [[Ego]] offered Yondu generous financial compensation in exchange for kidnapping his children and delivering them to him, Yondu agreed, despite the Ravagers' code explicitly forbidding the trafficking of children. However, when it became apparent that the children were being murdered, Yondu and his clan were exiled by Ogord.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====[[Kidnapping of Peter Quill]]==== {{Quote|When I [[Kidnapping of Peter Quill|picked you up]] as a kid, these [[Yondu Ravager Clan|boys]] wanted to eat you. They ain't never tasted no [[Humans|Terran]] before. I saved your life!|Yondu Udonta to [[Peter Quill]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} [[File:Kidnapping of Peter Quill.png|{{AltFloat}}|The Ravagers abduct [[Peter Quill]] on [[Earth]]]] In [[1988]], Yondu was hired by [[Ego]] to travel to [[Missouri]] on [[Earth]] and kidnap [[Peter Quill]]. Aware at that point that the other children he had delivered had been murdered, Yondu chose to keep Quill and raised him to be a [[Ravagers|Ravager]]. During the following years, Yondu often joked about his crew killing and eating Quill for pleasure, although Quill perceived this as an actual threat and became terrified of them.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====Christmas Presents==== [[File:Animated Yondu.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu berates [[Peter Quill|Quill]] and [[Kraglin Obfonteri|Obfonteri]] for celebrating Christmas]] One December, Yondu walked in on [[Peter Quill]] and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] decorating a homemade Christmas tree. Upon seeing this, Yondu yelled at the two about what they were doing, which Quill and Obfonteri explained that they were celebrating Christmas. However, after hearing how people give presents to others, he demeaned them as [[Ravagers]], stating that they have to fight for what they have and that being given presents sounded like sentiment, before angrily kicking the tree away. Yondu demanded that they clean up the decorations or he will make them clean the latrines, despite Obfonteri telling him that it was [[Gef]]'s favorite thing to do. Yondu then asked if he was getting talked back to, which Obfonteri denied, after which Yondu declared that he hated Christmas before storming out. [[File:Peter Quill and Yondu.png|{{AltFloat}}|left|Yondu and [[Peter Quill|Quill]] begin to bond]] Later, Yondu walked by the trashcan with the Christmas decorations. Looking in, Yondu saw a present from Quill to him. Yondu opened the gift and saw it was a knickknack. Amused, Yondu left a present for Quill, giving him with two [[Quad Blasters]] on his bed. Yondu was then joined by Quill who began to tease each other to show that they appreciated the gifts. Yondu began to bond with Quill and began to see him as a son figure.{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ====Raising Peter Quill==== [[File:GotGV2 Yondu Blu-Ray 4.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu training the young [[Peter Quill]]]] Over the next twenty-six years, Yondu developed a close relationship with Quill, despite his efforts of never showing any affection in person, training him to become a Ravager just like him.{{Ref|GotG}} During one such time, he took Quill to a forest, where he taught him how to accurately shoot using the [[Quad Blasters]]. Around the same time, Yondu was exiled from the other clans of Ravagers by [[Stakar Ogord]] after he found out that Yondu had been delivering children to Ego. Yondu defended himself saying he did not know better, but Stakar knew his protégé well enough to know that the former was too smart to be that ignorant and that the profitability from Ego's commissions made Yondu turn a blind eye. Because of this, Yondu became bitter towards his former mentor for leaving him, but knew deep down that he deserved the banishment due to letting his own greed overtaking his morals.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ===[[Quest for the Orb]]=== ====Hunting Down Star-Lord==== [[File:YonduPeter-GOTG.png|{{AltFloat}}|left|Yondu confronts [[Peter Quill]]]] {{Quote|I slaved putting this deal together, and now you're gonna rip me off! We do not do that to each other. We're [[Ravagers]], we got a code.|Yondu Udonta to [[Peter Quill]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Yondu discovered that a mysterious item called the [[Orb]] was located on [[Morag]]; he was offered a great fee if he retrieved the item for the [[Broker]]. However, when Yondu had finally arrived on Morag with his [[Yondu Ravager Clan|clan]], he discovered [[Peter Quill]] had betrayed him and found and taken the Orb for himself with the intention of selling it to the Broker before Yondu could. Yondu was furious and phoned Quill, who tried to ignore the call until [[Bereet]] answered the call for him. As he reluctantly spoke with Yondu, Quill did not deny he had taken the Orb, but he instead refused to give his location before hanging up the call. [[File:Yondu-Kraglin-Morag.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu threatens [[Horuz]] for challenging him]] Furious at this betrayal, Yondu issued a bounty for Quill's capture for 40,000 units; when Yondu said he wanted Quill alive, this led to an argument with [[Horuz]], who insisted that they should have handed Quill over to [[Ego]] like they were originally hired to do, noting Yondu had always been soft on Quill and had never punished him when he disobeyed his own orders. Yondu turned the situation around and threatened Horuz with his [[Yaka Arrow]] and assured his men that once he had Quill in their custody, he would kill him himself.{{Ref|GotG}} ====Threatening Broker==== [[File:Yondu-ToyShopping.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|left|Yondu asks to buy [[Broker]]'s decorations]] {{Quote|You gonna tell me what this [[Orb]] is, and why everybody cares so damn much about it. And then you gonna tell me, who out there might wanna buy it.|Yondu Udonta to [[Broker]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Yondu and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] then both traveled to [[Xandar]] to meet with [[Broker]]. Before revealing why they were really there, Yondu took some time to admire the various artifacts that the Broker had on for sale, commenting that he wished to buy some to decorate his own [[M-Ships|M-Ship]]. When Broker questioned if this was a joke or not, Obfonteri confirmed that Yondu was being completely serious. [[File:Guardians Of The Galaxy XBS0190 comp v003.1002.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu threatens [[Broker]] for information]] However, he made his true intentions known quickly when he then demanded to know to whom Broker intended to sell the [[Orb]]. Although Broker tried to insist that he would be unable to reveal the names of his buyers, Yondu ignored his many excuses and spoke over him with gibberish, mocking and annoying Broker the more he did it while Obfonteri laughed. As Broker still refused to give up the information, Yondu drew his [[Yaka Arrow]] and aimed it at Broker who, scared for his life, finally revealed that the [[Collector]] was the buyer. [[File:YonduArrivesOnKnowhere.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu locates [[Star-Lord]] on [[Knowhere]]]] Yondu and [[Yondu Ravager Clan|his clan]] traveled together to [[Knowhere]] to confront the Collector and reclaim the Orb. However, instead, they quickly found Quill, who had been trying to sell the Orb to the Collector as well. Yondu called out to Quill and demanded he stay where he was. However, Quill was also being attacked by [[Ronan the Accuser]] and his army of [[Sakaaran]] soldiers, so he fled before the [[Ravagers]] could catch him, finding himself chased by Ronan's army. [[File:Yondu-Captures-StarLord-Gamora.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu captures [[Star-Lord]] and [[Gamora]]]] Quill was able to briefly get away from Yondu by piloting a mining ship; however, before long Quill was forced to give his location away to save himself and [[Gamora]] from suffocating in space, as Quill had given her [[Star-Lord's Helmet|his helmet]] to try and save her. Yondu came to Quill's aid and found him floating in space beside the already dying Gamora. Yondu abducted the pair onto the ''[[Eclector]]'', sending Obfonteri and his men to then bring them to him for questioning.{{Ref|GotG}} ====A Questionable Partnership==== [[File:Czqi9ww.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|left|Yondu threatens to kill [[Peter Quill]]]] {{Quote|Hey, what do you say, Yondu? Me and you, taking down a mark side-by-side, like the old days."
"Let him go! You always did have a scrote, boy! That's why I kept you on as a young'un.|[[Star-Lord]] and Yondu Udonta|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Yondu initially berated [[Peter Quill]] for his many rebellious antics, beating him up and explaining everything Quill had done to let him down. When Yondu ranted about how he had saved Quill from being eaten by his [[Yondu Ravager Clan|subordinates]] the day he had been [[Kidnapping of Peter Quill|taken away]] by him, Quill argued that this was not a good enough reason for him to feel grateful to Yondu before insisting that they needed to find the [[Power Stone]], which was one of the [[Infinity Stones]]. [[File:Yondu-HappyFace-GotG.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu agrees to work with [[Star-Lord]]]] Despite Quill's attempts to explain everything and insist that the Power Stone could destroy all of [[Xandar]] if it was not recovered, Yondu aimed his [[Yaka Arrow]] at Quill's throat and prepared to execute him, but Quill called his bluff by convincing him that it was possible to steal the [[Orb]] from [[Ronan the Accuser]] with insider knowledge provided by [[Gamora]]. Thinking for a moment, Yondu withdrew his arrow and they decided to work together, celebrating with laughs and cheers all around. [[File:Y1.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|left|Yondu's ship is attacked by [[Rocket]]]] Before they could complete their arrangement, Yondu and Quill's reunion was interrupted by an explosion outside the ship. When Yondu went to investigate, he discovered [[Rocket]] had taken control of Quill's ship, the ''[[Milano]]'', and was threatening to destroy Yondu's ship with [[Drax the Destroyer]] using the [[Hadron Enforcer]] if Yondu did not free Quill and Gamora. Yondu called Rocket's bluff but Quill quickly appeared and assured Rocket that everything had been worked out and they were now fine. [[File:Yondu-wants-the-Orb.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu gives [[Peter Quill]] a final warning]] Yondu allowed Quill to return to his ship to work out a plan with Rocket, [[Groot]], Drax, and Gamora. Eventually, Quill returned with his team and they discussed a plan which involved Quill and Yondu's ship boarding the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' and killing Ronan once inside. While they prepared for battle, Yondu pulled Quill aside to remind him that once the battle was over, he would get the [[Power Stone]], threatening to kill him if he failed to obey.{{Ref|GotG}} ====[[Battle of Xandar]]==== [[File:Y2.JPG|{{AltFloat}}|left|Yondu flies into the [[Battle of Xandar]]]] {{Quote|No more games with me, boy! I'll see you at the end of this!|Yondu Udonta to [[Star-Lord]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} With their plan going into motion, Yondu and [[Star-Lord]] led their squad of ships into the [[Battle of Xandar]]; Yondu commanded his [[Yondu Ravager Clan|clan]] to attack [[Ronan the Accuser]]'s army of [[Sakaarans]] when Ronan sent in his soldiers as defense. While [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] and [[Rocket]] shot a hole in the side of the ''[[Dark Aster]]'', Yondu and Quill planned to enter the ship together. However, Ronan's army soon overwhelmed them and Yondu's [[M-Ships|M-Ship]] was quickly shot down in the chaos. As he fell, Yondu vowed to survive and promised to see Quill at the end of the battle while Quill continued to battle Ronan's army. [[File:YonduCornered-GotG.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu is found by [[Ronan the Accuser]]'s men]] Yondu survived the crash and got out of his wrecked ship, picking up some of the items he had bought from [[Broker]]'s [[Broker's Shop|shop]]. When he turned around, Yondu discovered that he had been surrounded by a fleet of [[Sakaarans]] who seemingly recognized him from his slave days as they referred to him by name. They aimed their [[Necroblaster]]s at him and ordered that Yondu surrender himself before commanding his men to attack the various [[Nova Corps]] ships that were currently assisting Quill and the others in the aerial battle against Ronan's forces. [[File:GOTG Yondu Arrow 1.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu uses his arrow to kill the [[Sakaarans]]]] Instead of obeying, Yondu calmly opened his jacket without a word and whistled. As the Sakaarans stood momentarily confused at his actions, Yondu used his [[Yaka Arrow]] to single-handedly kill every Sakaaran in front of him as his arrow darted through all their bodies, even causing one of their [[Necrocraft]] to crash and explode. With all his would-be captors dead, Yondu collected his arrow and made his way back towards [[Xandar]] where the battle was still raging on with his Ravagers protecting the innocent people from harm.{{Ref|GotG}} ====Escaping Xandar==== [[File:Yonducharactershot.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu takes the fake [[Orb]] by mistake]] {{Quote|Quite the light show. Ain't this sweet. But you got some business to attend to before all the nookie-nookie starts.|Yondu Udonta to [[Star-Lord]] and [[Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} By the time Yondu made it back to the city, he arrived just in time to witness [[Ronan the Accuser]]'s death. Yondu teased [[Peter Quill]] and [[Gamora]] as they shared an intimate moment and demanded Quill to hand over the [[Orb]] as agreed. Although Quill tried to argue, he eventually agreed and handed the Orb over to Yondu and the Ravagers, before then reminding Yondu not to open the Orb for his and his men's safety. [[File:KraglinYondu-DiscussEgo.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] discuss [[Ego]]]] Yondu agreed and left Quill, unaware that he took the wrong Orb. As he prepared to leave [[Xandar]] with [[Kraglin Obfonteri]], they both discussed how Quill had turned out better than they expected, with Obfonteri noting that the result of not delivering Quill to his own father, [[Ego]] like they were originally hired to do had worked out for the best. Yondu noted that he had thought Ego was a jackass as they flew an [[M-Ships|M-Ship]] back to the ''[[Eclector]]'' to make their hasty escape. [[File:YonduSmiles.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu laughs when he finds the Troll Doll]] As the [[Yondu Ravager Clan]] traveled through space, they drank and celebrated the victory in the [[Battle of Xandar]] and how they had defeated the [[Kree]] warmonger Ronan. Yondu sat alone and decided to open the Orb given to him by Quill only to find a {{WPS|Troll doll}}. Yondu realized Quill had used a classic Ravager move and that the [[Infinity Stones|Infinity Stone]] was left with [[Irani Rael]] for safe-keeping. Instead of being angered, however, Yondu began laughing and kept the doll as a souvenir.{{Ref|GotG}} Some time afterwards, Yondu acquired a Zune, which he would give to Quill if he rejoined the Ravagers.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ===Ravager Mutiny=== ====Dealing with Ayesha==== [[File:GotGV2 HD Stills 12.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu spots [[Stakar Ogord]] at the [[Iron Lotus]]]] {{Quote|You betrayed the code. [[Ravagers]] don't deal in kids!"
"I told you before, I didn't know what was going on–"
"You didn't know 'cause you didn't wanna know, 'cause that made you rich."
"I demand a seat on the table. I wear these flames, same as you!|[[Stakar Ogord]] and Yondu Udonta|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} A few months in the wake of the [[Battle of Xandar]], Yondu, along with his [[Yondu Ravager Clan|clan]] went to the [[Iron Lotus]] on [[Contraxia]] to relax. After falling intimate and entertaining himself with a [[Love Bots|Love Bot]], Yondu got dressed from his room as he watched all of the other Ravagers outside have fun. As Yondu went outside, he quickly approached [[Stakar Ogord]] who walked away from him in utter disgust at seeing Yondu again, in spite of the showing Ogord a respectful gesture. [[File:Guardians_of_the_Galaxy_Vol._2_203.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu angrily argues with [[Stakar Ogord]]]] Yondu got angry with Ogord and chased after him and the two started to argue. Yondu demanded that Ogord listen to him, but Ogord refused, citing that he had been exiled for the child trafficking that led to the children's deaths, claiming that Yondu did not care about their fate as it had made him wealthy. Right as Ogord left, [[Ayesha]] arrived to hire Yondu and his clan to hunt down the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] who had stolen some of their [[Anulax Batteries]] from them. Yondu took the job and left to find the Guardians unaware that part of his faction was planning to start a mutiny against him as they believed he has gone soft. It is implied that Yondu's faction was struggling financially as they had been independent for many years.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====[[Attack on Berhert]]==== [[File:GotGV2 Trailer WP 17.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu finally tracks down [[Rocket]]]] {{Quote|We ain't stupid enough to help kill the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. The whole dang [[Nova Corps]] be on us."
"That ain't right. I just gotta say this one time, Captain. No matter how many times [[Peter Quill|Quill]] betrays you, you protect him.|Yondu Udonta and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} The [[Ravagers]] easily tracked the Guardians of the Galaxy on [[Berhert]] as Yondu had placed a tracker on the ''[[Milano]]'' after the [[Battle of Xandar]]. After [[Rocket]] took down some of the Ravagers, Yondu got the upper hand on him with his [[Yaka Arrow]]. Yondu told Rocket about the job they were given by Ayesha and that she wants him to return the Guardians to her so she can kill them. Rocket pleaded that they don't hurt [[Groot]] if he told them the location of the batteries but Yondu said that he wasn't going to hand him over which angered some of the Ravagers. [[File:Yondu loses fin2.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu loses his [[Yaka Arrow Controller]]]] Yondu decided to keep the batteries and sell them for a quarter of what Ayesha was going to pay them causing a conflict between the Ravagers. [[Taserface]] along with some of the [[Yondu Ravager Clan|clan]], including [[Kraglin Obfonteri]], turned against Yondu saying he has gone soft. The Ravagers then turned on each other and were about to engage in a fight when [[Nebula]] shot Yondu's [[Yaka Arrow Controller]] off the top of his head, consequently causing him to go unconscious from the impact.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====Taserface's Mutiny==== [[File:GotGV2 Villains 5.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu brutally beaten up by [[Taserface]]]] {{Quote|You're the one what killed those men by leading them down the wrong path because you're weak and stupid. It's time for the [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravagers]] to rise once again to glory with a new Captain; Taserface!|[[Taserface]] to Yondu Udonta|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Yondu, [[Rocket]], and [[Groot]] were taken to the ''[[Eclector]]'' where all [[Ravagers]] who sided with Yondu were ejected into space. Yondu, being subdued, watched as [[Taserface]] took control of his [[Yondu Ravager Clan|clan]] and beat him up. Yondu was then put in a cell with Rocket and would be delivered to the [[Kree]] the next day where they would be executed. [[File:044ynd ons inl 08.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu talking to [[Rocket]] in his cell]] Yondu told Rocket about his history as a Ravager including his time with his [[Stakar Ogord's Team|team]] that showed similarities to the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] as they had a family like a relationship. Yondu also mentioned his exile by [[Stakar Ogord]] and that he deserves everything that is happening to him as he broke the Ravager code. Rocket told Yondu that [[Peter Quill]] was with [[Ego]], worrying him. Yondu was asked by Rocket on why he didn't deliver Quill, saying that he was good for thieving.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====[[Escape from the Eclector|Escape from the ''Eclector'']]==== [[File:GotGV2 Baby Groot Rescue 2.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu asks [[Groot]] for help escaping]] {{Quote|Hey, you wanna help us get outta here? There's something I need you to get and bring back to me. In the captain's quarters, there's a [[Yaka Arrow Controller|prototype fin]] – the thing I wore on my head. There's a drawer next to the bunk. It's in that. It's red. You got it?|Yondu Udonta to [[Groot]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} [[Rocket]] then told Yondu that they needed to escape right as [[Groot]], who had just been terrorized by [[Retch]], walked by their cell. Yondu asked Groot to retrieve his [[Yaka Arrow Controller]] so that he could use his Yaka Arrow to help them all escape. Groot failed to understand Yondu's orders and retrieved several items that were not the controller including his underwear, a desk, [[Vorker]]'s eye, and a severed toe. After a few failed attempts, [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] eventually retrieved the controller and decided to help them as he was not aware that they were going to start a mutiny and kill all of Obfonteri's friends. Yondu told Kraglin to get the third [[Quadrant]] ready for release. [[File:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 67.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu kills all the [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravagers]] with his [[Yaka Arrow|arrow]]]] Obfonteri was instructed by Rocket to play some of [[Peter Quill]]'s music to warn the Ravagers that Yondu was escaping, but what they didn't know is that he was already ready for them with his newly attached controller. When "{{WPS|Come A Little Bit Closer}}" alerted the Ravagers, two of them checked on Yondu they were killed by him with his new controller and the three escaped their cells. Then a group of Ravagers charged at them, but they were no match for Yondu who killed them all within seconds and then continued to escape. The three made their way to a catwalk where Yondu managed to kill a lot more Ravagers who then fell past them after being stabbed by the [[Yaka Arrow]]. [[File:GotGV2 17Days 5.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu attempting to kill [[Taserface]]]] Yondu, Rocket, and Groot made their way to the control room where they used the advantage of the display screens to kill any remaining Ravagers. While having fun with their attacks, Yondu then noticed Taserface walking through a hallway and called his arrow and flew it straight at him while igniting it. Yondu destroyed the ''[[Eclector]]'' due to the arrow hitting the fuel tank, killing Taserface. Yondu then met up with Obfonteri and the four escaped into the [[Quadrant]] and headed for [[Ego|Ego's Planet]].{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====Confronting Rocket Raccoon==== [[File:GOTG2 Art of VFX 10.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu riding the [[Quadrant]] at high speeds]] {{Quote|You can fool yourself and everyone else, but you can't fool me. I know who you are."
"You don't know anything about me, loser."
"I know everything about you. I know you play like you're the meanest and the hardest, but actually, you're the most scared of all.|Yondu Udonta and [[Rocket]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Having escaped with the others, the gang headed straight for [[Ego]] to rescue the rest of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] as Yondu knew Ego's true intentions for [[Peter Quill]]. As they prepared to leave, [[Rocket]] set the ship to seven-hundred jumps - fourteen times the safe limit of fifty - causing all of their faces, including [[Groot]] and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]], to temporarily disfigure as they traveled. [[File:Yondu and Rocket.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu argues with [[Rocket]]'s attitude]] When they arrived, the four were thrown to the ground after the number of jumps they just took at once. Rocket told Yondu that he wanted to save Quill from Ego so he could prove he's better than him, but Yondu confronted Rocket about who he really is. Rocket rejected Yondu's observation but he continued on by telling him how much they are the same. After their dispute, Yondu told them that they're going to fight a planet which Rocket hesitated as he was not aware of Ego's true form.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ===Final Battle=== ====Stopping Ego==== [[File:GotGV2 It's Showtime 5.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu and [[Star-Lord]] pilot the [[Construction Drilling Vessel]]]] {{Quote|You still reckon that's the reason I kept you around, you idiot?"
"That's what you told me, you old doofus."
"Well, once I figured out what happened to those other kids, I wasn't just gonna hand you over.|Yondu Udonta and [[Star-Lord]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Yondu and [[Rocket]] saved [[Star-Lord]] by crashing straight into [[Ego]]. The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] got into the [[Construction Drilling Vessel]] which surprised Quill to see Yondu helping them. Quill sarcastically thanked Yondu for not delivering him to Ego still under the impression that the only reason he kept him was that he was skinny. Yondu told Quill that he knew about what happened to Ego's other children so that was why he didn't deliver him. [[File:Guardians2-movie-screencaps com-11600.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu and [[Star-Lord]] drilling into [[Ego]]'s core]] As they broke free of Ego's palace, Quill directed the ship towards the ground. Yondu insisted they flee the planet, only to be told that Ego was going to destroy the universe as they know it, so they had to drill into his core to destroy it. As they drilled down, Yondu asked Quill about what Ego wanted him for. Quill told him that he wanted to use his power, which he used to create a ball which was all he could think of, which Yondu tried to tell him that he doesn't use his head to control the [[Yaka Arrow]].{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====[[Battle on Ego's Planet]]==== [[File:GotGV2 Yondu Blu-Ray 6.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu referring to himself as {{WPS|Mary Poppins}}]] {{Quote|You look like {{WPS|Mary Poppins}}."
"Is he cool?"
"...Hell yeah, he's cool."
"I'm Mary Poppins, y'all!|[[Star-Lord]] and Yondu Udonta|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} As they were destroying the core, [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] informed them that the [[Sovereign]] were coming right as they came under fire by the Sovereign, who were given Yondu's coordinates by [[Taserface]] in his final moments. The Guardians fell out of the ship and Rocket and Quill went to blow up Ego's core with a bomb he just created leaving Yondu and [[Nebula]] on the Laser Drill. Quill flew back to the ship to ask Yondu if he had any tape for the bomb but he didn't. The Sovereign started firing at the ship causing their thrusters to go out. [[File:Guardians V2 real.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu joining the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]]] Nebula hooked herself up to the ship causing her to be electrocuted as the ship's lasers destroyed the entire Sovereign fleet. The ship then blew up from the attack so Yondu quickly summoned his [[Yaka Arrow]] to escape. Yondu used his Arrow to fly down which Quill compared him to {{WPS|Mary Poppins}} hovering with her umbrella and when he asked if "he" was cool, Quill said yes. Yondu, not knowing that Mary Poppins was woman, proceeded to proclaim that he was Mary Poppins. Yondu and Quill landed and regrouped with the rest.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====Joining the Guardians of the Galaxy==== [[File:GSGBTGATLTE4.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu fighting alongside the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]]]] {{Quote|I ain't done nothin' right my whole life, rat. You need to give me this.|Yondu Udonta to [[Rocket]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} All the Guardians came together, but [[Mantis]] was knocked out by Ego causing the planet to be under his control again. Yondu called [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] to bring the [[Quadrant]] down so the Guardians could evacuate. They were soon separated by Ego leaving him, Quill and Rocket to fight off Ego's attacks. After a while of fighting, Yondu and Rocket become trapped by some rubble by Ego and his Yaka Arrow broke. Before Yondu could be completely covered by the rubble, he inspired Quill to fight Ego. Yondu was freed along with the other Guardians who were trapped by Ego.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====Self Sacrifice==== [[File:GotGV2 Yondu Blu-Ray 3.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu manages to save [[Peter Quill]]'s life]] {{Quote|[[Ego|He]] may have been your father, boy, but he wasn't your daddy. I'm sorry, I didn't do none of it right. I'm damn lucky you're my boy.|Yondu Udonta to [[Star-Lord]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} When the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] were evacuating due to the bomb being set off by [[Groot]], Yondu decided to stay so he could save [[Peter Quill]], as he has done nothing else right in his life. [[Rocket]] gave him the last space suit and flight suit. Groot then welcomed Yondu onto the Guardians of the Galaxy, to which Rocket proudly translated. [[File:Yondu Death2.png|{{AltFloat}}|Yondu's lifeless body is held by [[Peter Quill]]]] As [[Ego]] exploded, Yondu, wearing a [[Holographic Space Suits|flight suit]] rescued Quill from the destruction and flew him to safety. Unfortunately, there was only one space suit left so Yondu gave it to Quill and saved his life, sacrificing his own. Yondu told Quill that Ego may have been his biological father, but he was not his daddy, as they flew into space. Quill watched as Yondu began to suffocate and freeze right in front of him, not being able to do anything about it. Before Yondu fully succumbed, he patted Quill's face to calm him. Quill held onto Yondu as he mourned his loss.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ===Legacy=== ====Ravager Funeral==== {{Quote|You know it's a shame that it took the tragedy of losing Yondu to bring us all together again. But I think he would be proud knowing that we're back as a [[Stakar Ogord's Team|team]].|[[Stakar Ogord]] to his [[Stakar Ogord's Team|team]] members|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Quill was retrieved from space along with Yondu's body, giving him a funeral with the Guardians and [[Kraglin Obfonteri]]. Quill gave a eulogy and talked about how he used to tell kids that [[David Hasselhoff]] was his dad when in fact Yondu was kind of like Hasselhoff, essentially meaning he was Quill's dad all along. They then cremated the body as [[Rocket]] called the rest of the [[Ravagers]] who gave Yondu a Ravager farewell. After Yondu's funeral, Obfonteri was given the [[Yaka Arrow Controller]] while he gave Quill a {{WPS|Zune}} that Yondu had found in a shop and was going to give to Quill.{{Ref|GotGV2}} Obfonteri took up Yondu's trademark weapon and began to practice using the weapon only to end up accidentally (and nonfatally) stabbing [[Drax]] in the chest. Yondu's actions went on to inspire [[Stakar Ogord]] to assemble [[Stakar Ogord's Team|his previous team]], which Yondu was previously a part of, as he believed that Yondu would be proud to know that they were together again.''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]'' [[List of Post-credits Scenes|Mid-credits Scenes]] ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Centaurian Physiology''': As a [[Centaurian]], Yondu naturally possesses superhuman attributes. **'''Enhanced Durability''': [[File:Yondu Surviving the Explosion.png|thumb|250px|Yondu surviving the explosion]] Yondu's skin was very tough, allowing him to survive an explosion of a [[Construction Drilling Vessel]] that [[Gamora]] believed had killed him and [[Peter Quill]]. He could also withstand [[Ego]]'s attacks. **'''Enhanced Vision''': All Centaurians possess superior vision allowing Yondu to use his [[Yaka Arrow]] at great distances.{{Ref|MSVD}} ===Abilities=== {{Quote|I don't use my head to fly the [[Yaka Arrow|arrow]], boy. I use my heart.|Yondu Udonta to [[Star-Lord]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} *'''Arrow Mastery''': [[File:Yondu and Arrow.png|thumb|250px|Yondu controlling his [[Yaka Arrow]]]] Yondu wore a [[Yaka Arrow Controller|cybernetic prosthesis]] protruding out of his head that allowed him to control and aim an [[Yaka Arrow|arrow]] made of [[Yaka]] with a series of whistles. Depending on the tone and intensity of the whistle, the speed, strength, and direction can be controlled. With his skill, Yondu was capable of either threatening an individual, killing an entire squad of [[Sakaarans]] before they could have time to react, or eliminating an entire fleet of the Ravagers who mutinied against him. The arrow is capable of penetrating anything and seems capable of moving at a speed of Mach 5 at least. With his arrow, Yondu has killed the [[Maskless Sakaaran]], [[Narblik]], [[Huhtar]], [[Scrote]], [[Halfnut]], [[Brahl]], and [[Gef]]. *'''Master Thief''': Yondu was skilled in the art of thievery. This allowed him to get up in the ranks of the [[Ravagers]] before he was kicked out. He then started his own [[Yondu Ravager Clan|faction]] and taught his adoptive son [[Peter Quill]] how to thieve. *'''Master Pilot''': Yondu was a highly skilled pilot; he was selected to join [[Peter Quill]] in the assault inside the ''[[Dark Aster]]''. He was able to shoot down many enemy ships before his [[M-Ships|M-Ship]] was damaged and he was forced to make a crash landing. *'''Expert Tactician''': Yondu was the captain of his own [[Yondu Ravager Clan|clan]], commanding dozens of [[Ravagers]] in missions and heists across the whole galaxy. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Yaka Arrow]]''': [[File:Yondu Yaka Arrow.png|thumb|250px|Yondu controls the [[Yaka Arrow]] with a whistle]] Yondu used this whistle-controlled arrow made from [[Yaka]] to attack his enemies. Although Yondu rarely actually used the arrow, he often threatened people with it, including [[Star-Lord]] and [[Broker]], who both knew how deadly it could be. During the [[Battle of Xandar]], however, Yondu found himself cornered by a unit of the [[Sakaarans]] and used the arrow to kill every enemy in mere seconds, even managing to destroy a [[Necrocraft]] by ripping it apart from the inside. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Yaka Arrow Controller]]''': Protruding out of Yondu's head was a prosthetic metal piece which allowed Yondu to control and aim the [[Yaka Arrow]], as it glowed red whenever he was controlling the arrow. *'''[[Aero-Rigs]]''': Yondu used one of Rocket's jet-pack like devices to seamlessly fly through the air, giving him great mobility in combat. ===Vehicles=== *'''''[[Eclector]]''''': Yondu's ship was the ''Eclector'' and was the main headquarters and living space of his [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravager Clan]]. **'''[[Quadrant]]''': While escaping from [[Taserface]] and the ''Eclector'', Yondu decided to blow up his ship and take the Quadrant to [[Ego]] to save [[Peter Quill]]. *'''[[M-Ships|M-Ship]]''': Yondu has his own personal [[M-Ships|M-Ship]] along with the other [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravagers]], which he piloted himself during the [[Battle of Xandar]], shooting several of [[Ronan the Accuser]]'s army of [[Necrocraft]] out of the sky. However, the ship was soon shot out of the sky and crash-landed on [[Xandar]], although Yondu was able to survive. *'''[[Construction Drilling Vessel]]''': On [[Ego]], Yondu used a laser drill to get to Ego's brain so that they could kill Ego. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *Father *Mother *[[Star-Lord|Peter Quill/Star-Lord]] - Adoptive Son, Protégé and Teammate ===Allies=== *[[Ravagers]] **[[Stakar Ogord's Team]] - Former Teammates and Friends ***[[Stakar Ogord]] - Liberator ***[[Aleta Ogord]] ***[[Martinex]] ***[[Charlie-27]] ***[[Krugarr]] ***[[Mainframe]] **[[Yondu Ravager Clan]] - Former Subordinates ***[[Horuz]] † ***[[Oblo]] † ***[[Tullk]] † **[[Kraglin Obfonteri]] - Close Friend and Former Teammate **[[Molly]] *[[Love Bots]] *[[Guardians of the Galaxy]] - Teammates **[[Gamora]] † **[[Drax the Destroyer]] **[[Rocket]] - Former Attempted Victim and Friend **[[Groot]] - Friend **[[Nebula]] **[[Mantis]] *[[Broker]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Kree Empire]] **[[Ronan the Accuser]] † *[[Sakaarans]] **[[Maskless Sakaaran]] † - Victim *[[Sovereign]] **[[Ayesha]] † - Former Employer and Attempted Killer *[[Ravagers]] **[[Yondu Ravager Clan]] - Former Subordinates ***[[Taserface]] † - Victim ***[[Gef]] † - Victim ***[[Halfnut]] † - Victim ***[[Brahl]] † - Victim ***[[Scrote]] † - Victim ***[[Narblik]] † - Victim ***[[Retch]] † ***[[Vorker]] † - Victim ***[[Huhtar]] † - Victim ***[[Shran]] † - Victim *[[Ego]] † - Former Employer and Attempted Killer {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== {| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable" width="100%" ! Appearance for Yondu |- | {{Scroll box|content= In chronological order: *{{Appearance|GotG}} (flashbacks) *{{Appearance|GotGV2}} (flashbacks) *{{Appearance|TGotGHS}} (flashbacks) *{{Appearance|GotGPIC}} *{{Appearance|GotG}} **{{Appearance|GotGV2P1}} **{{Appearance|GotGV2P2}} **{{Appearance|GotGRASaCD}} **{{Appearance|GotGV2RR}} (concurrent events) **{{Appearance|AIWTHJ}} (flashbacks; concurrent events) *{{Appearance|GotGV2}} **{{Appearance|GotGV2MtT}} *{{Appearance|SHAaL109}} (photo) *{{Appearance|TGotGHS}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|GotGV3}} (illusion) }} |} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Yondu Udonta was one of the [[w:c:marvel:Guardians of the Galaxy (Earth-691)|original members]] of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] from the 31st century of [[w:c:marvel:Earth-691|Earth-691]], using a bow and a quiver of arrows made of [[Yaka]] as weapons. Following his introduction in ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'', a [[w:c:marvel:Yondu Udonta (Earth-616)|new version of the character]] more similar to his movie counterpart was introduced in the Mainstream Comic Universe, as a 21st century criminal ancestor of the original Yondu Udonta. **Yondu's [[Yaka Arrow Controller|prototype fin]] is similar to his comics counterpart's fin. *Before the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] met [[Ego]], [[Drax]] was convinced that Yondu was [[Star-Lord]]'s biological father. ==Behind the Scenes== *In the director's commentary for ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'', director [[James Gunn]] states that "Yondu is not dumb" and suggested that Yondu was aware, or at least suspected, that [[Star-Lord]] was not giving him the true Infinity Stone, but simply did not wish to kill Quill. This is supported by the fact that he does not appear particularly surprised to find it not inside the container when he opens it, but instead appears pleased by the "gift" of a troll doll.''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)/Home Video]]'' *In an extra gag scene of ''[[Thor: Ragnarok]]'', [[Michael Rooker]] appears as Yondu Udonta on [[Asgard]] during the attempted execution of a woman by [[Skurge]]'s hand. In the scene, Yondu asks Skurge for ''"where [[Kevin Feige|Kevin]] and [[Louis D'Esposito|Lou]]'s offices are"'', before telling him to proceed with what he was doing. *[[David R. Grant]], [[Larry Rippenkroeger]] and [[Panuvat Anthony Nanakornpanom]] were stunt doubles for [[Michael Rooker]] in the role of Yondu Udonta. *[[Robert Eames]] was a stand-in for [[Michael Rooker]] in the role of Yondu Udonta. ==References== {{Gallery|Yondu/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{WP}} *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Ravager Yondu|Ravager Yondu}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/yondu}} {{Navbox Guardians of the Galaxy}} [[de:Yondu Udonta]] [[es:Yondu Udonta]] [[fr:Yondu Udonta]] [[pl:Yondu]] [[ru:Йонду Удонта]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy (film) Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3 Characters]] [[Category:The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Comic Characters]] [[Category:Book Characters]] [[Category:Centaurians]] [[Category:Cyborgs]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Gray Hair]] [[Category:Bald Hair]] [[Category:Red Eyes]] [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Ravagers Captains]] [[Category:Stakar Ogord's Team Members]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Members]] [[Category:Enhanced Individuals]] [[Category:High Body Count]] [[Category:Deceased Characters]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Themselves]] [[Category:Characters Killed by Yondu]]
